# Compare previous and current frames to understand what changed

    curr_nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    print("Previous nodes:", len(prev_nodes))
    print("Current nodes:", len(curr_nodes)
    # Compare by hash to track objects
    prev_hashes = {n['hash']: n for n in prev_nodes}
    curr_hashes = {n['hash']: n for n in curr_nodes}
    print("Same hashes:", set(prev_hashes.keys()) & set(curr_hashes.keys()))
    print("New hashes:", set(curr_hashes.keys()) - set(prev_hashes.keys()))
    print("Missing hashes:", set(prev_hashes.keys()) - set(curr_hashes.keys()))
</parameter>
